name: provizion-led-signs
description: ProVizion LED Signs - LED & Digital Sign Manufacturer

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run server" "npm run client" "npm run studio"
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd ../studio && npm install && npx sanity build --yes && cp -r dist ../client/dist/studio
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ../studio && npm install
